description: All deficiencies corrected, final inspections passed, home cleaned to delivery standard, and certificate of occupancy in hand before keys transfer to client.

categories.name: Punch List Completion
items: Superintendent-generated punch list issued with line-item owner and due date for each item
All paint touch-ups complete — no visible roller holidays, brush marks, or miscut edges at trim/wall transitions
All trim nail holes filled and touch-painted; caulk lines at base, crown, and casing are continuous and tooled smooth
Cabinet doors and drawer fronts aligned within 1/16-inch reveal tolerance; soft-close hardware confirmed on every hinge and drawer slide
All tile grout joints consistent in width and color; no cracked, hollow, or lippage-exceeding tiles (ANSI A108.02 ≤1/32-inch lippage for rectified tile)
Hardwood flooring gaps at walls covered by base/shoe; no squeaks when walked — screws or face-nails driven where needed
All interior doors operate without binding; latch bolt engages strike plate flush; door gaps at head and jamb ≤3/32 inch consistent
All exterior doors and windows locked, sealed, and confirmed weather-tight; no daylight visible at jamb or sill

categories.name: MEP Final Functional Tests
items: All plumbing fixtures run simultaneously for 5 minutes; no drips at supply stops, P-trap connections, or drain gaskets
Hot water delivery confirmed at every fixture; tankless or water heater set point verified at 120°F per manufacturer and code
All HVAC zones call for heat and cool; temperature swing at thermostat confirmed within 2°F of set point
HVAC filter(s) replaced new at turnover; all grilles and diffusers seated flush with ceiling/wall surface
Every electrical outlet tested with a three-light receptacle tester — open ground, reversed polarity, or open neutral flagged and corrected
GFCI protection confirmed at all kitchen, bath, garage, exterior, and wet-area circuits per NEC 210.8
AFCI breakers confirmed on all bedroom and applicable living-space circuits per NEC 210.12
All ceiling fans operational on all speeds; remote or wall control paired and confirmed
Smoke and CO detectors powered, interconnected, and tested per NFPA 72; locations verified against Baldwin County Building Department approved plans

categories.name: Final Inspections & Permits
items: Baldwin County Building Department final building inspection passed and card signed
Baldwin County electrical final inspection passed
Baldwin County plumbing final inspection passed
Baldwin County mechanical (HVAC) final inspection passed
Certificate of Occupancy (CO) received from Baldwin County and scanned to project file
Septic system final inspection (Baldwin County Health Department) passed and documentation on file
Any open stop-work orders or correction notices confirmed resolved and closed in county records

categories.name: Site & Exterior Closeout
items: All construction debris removed from lot; dumpster pulled
Final grade confirmed — positive drainage away from foundation minimum 6 inches per 10 feet per IRC R401.3
Sod, seed, or landscaping installed per contract scope; no bare soil disturbing erosion control at storm drains
Driveway and walkways free of concrete splatter, paint, and caulk smears; expansion joints sealed
All exterior light fixtures installed, lamped, and operational; photocell or timer confirmed where specified
Gutters and downspouts clear of debris and discharging away from foundation
Mailbox, house numbers, and any site signage installed per HOA or county requirements
Temporary power pole removed and service entrance finalized with Alabama Power

categories.name: Deep Clean & Presentation
items: Professional construction clean completed: all windows cleaned inside and out, frames wiped
All hard-surface floors swept, mopped, and free of grout haze, adhesive residue, and scuff marks
Carpet vacuumed; any construction stains treated or carpet replaced per contract obligation
All cabinet interiors wiped; no sawdust, packaging material, or adhesive labels remaining
All appliances wiped interior and exterior; protective film removed from stainless and glass surfaces
All light fixtures cleaned; no fingerprints on glass shades or chrome trims
Bathrooms sanitized — toilets, tubs, showers, and vanities cleaned to move-in standard
Garage floor swept; no concrete mud, drywall dust, or fasteners on slab

categories.name: Client Walkthrough & Sign-Off
items: Pre-walkthrough superintendent review completed — superintendent signs off that all known items are resolved before client arrives
Client walkthrough conducted room by room with superintendent and PM present; new punch items documented on Palmetto Walkthrough Form
All systems demonstrated to client: HVAC thermostats, tankless water heater controls, electrical panel with breaker map, irrigation controller
All appliances demonstrated and appliance manuals, warranty cards, and serial numbers packaged for client
Warranty documentation packet assembled: Palmetto 1-year workmanship warranty, structural warranty (if applicable), and all sub/manufacturer warranties
Client signs Palmetto Certificate of Substantial Completion and Punch List Acceptance form
Keys, garage remotes, mailbox key, and gate fobs (if applicable) counted and transferred to client on signature

categories.name: Project Closeout
items: Final draw request submitted to construction lender with CO attached
All subcontractor final invoices received, reviewed against contract, and approved for payment
Conditional lien waivers collected from all subs and suppliers upon final payment; unconditional waivers to follow within 30 days
As-built redlines (if any field changes occurred) scanned and uploaded to project Drive folder
Superintendent's photo documentation of final condition uploaded and archived by room
Project file closed in Palmetto's project management system; client contact info transferred to warranty tracking roster
30-day and 11-month warranty check-in dates calendared and assigned to PM
